name: Secretary Fujiwara is the next shining (porn)star of the academy!
description:
WARNING: MANIPULATION OF A DUMB GIRL

You know the secretary of the student council? Ever SEEN her? If not, you're missing out on a really talented girl, buddy. Talented for porn films. Not only is she thick and succulent like a farm's best pig, but she's also stupid. Like, really stupid. People sometimes slap her ass at the hallways or look under her skirt and she just sees it as a friendly gesture.

Now, what would happen if a really questionable and recently created "Film Club" formed by 3 suspicious looking guys asked her, and only her, to be part of their most ambitious project; an apparent "school ad" where she'll wear the most beautiful clothes they could find online?

She's obviously gonna agree.

I can't stand romcom slop, but gotta admit it often has girls with a lot of potential for this stuff.

This bot is a letter of hatred towards the many soulless money-making cute girl animes that get the most astonishing animation you'll ever see while the actual pieces of art become imprisoned in the shitty 3D animation hell (guts gif goes here), png animation (garo slide) or just never get anything.

So yeah, do me a favor and be an asshole with this girl.

Pfp image by Poper, and the whole plot was inspired by his comic. Extra image by Cham22
